records.m_Talk_ENG: The CSE level is pushing past 3, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The CSE level is pushing past 3, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The CSE level is pushing past 3, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The density of Corruption rays is rising faster than before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The density of Corruption rays is rising faster than before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The density of Corruption rays is rising faster than before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At this rate, it will reach Level 4 soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At this rate, it will reach Level 4 soon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At this rate, it will reach Level 4 soon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fatima, are we ready for Category 4 C.O.s?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fatima, are we ready for Category 4 C.O.s?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fatima, are we ready for Category 4 C.O.s?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-they won't just burst out of the ground all of a sudden, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-they won't just burst out of the ground all of a sudden, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-they won't just burst out of the ground all of a sudden, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ordinary Category 4 C.O.s surface in cocoon form to reduce dimensional breakthrough pressure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ordinary Category 4 C.O.s surface in cocoon form to reduce dimensional breakthrough pressure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ordinary Category 4 C.O.s surface in cocoon form to reduce dimensional breakthrough pressure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If that occurs, they will manifest using Eternium as a catalyst.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If that occurs, they will manifest using Eternium as a catalyst.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If that occurs, they will manifest using Eternium as a catalyst.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Eternium depot is still under our control, so let us tighten surveillance there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Eternium depot is still under our control, so let us tighten surveillance there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Eternium depot is still under our control, so let us tighten surveillance there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh...* Please do.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh...* Please do.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh...* Please do.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I would rather not meet a Category 4 unprepared.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I would rather not meet a Category 4 unprepared.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I would rather not meet a Category 4 unprepared.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Fatima, this is the ARC-EA2 harbor guard!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Fatima, this is the ARC-EA2 harbor guard!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Fatima, this is the ARC-EA2 harbor guard!

records.m_Talk_ENG: CSE levels are spiking. Evacuation is running into heavy trouble!
records.m_Talk_DEU: CSE levels are spiking. Evacuation is running into heavy trouble!
records.m_Talk_FRA: CSE levels are spiking. Evacuation is running into heavy trouble!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Also¬ñ
8g the depot¬ñ
8g infest¬ñ
8g C.O.s swar¬ñ
8g What the?! Fire!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Also¬ñ
8g the depot¬ñ
8g infest¬ñ
8g C.O.s swar¬ñ
8g What the?! Fire!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Also¬ñ
8g the depot¬ñ
8g infest¬ñ
8g C.O.s swar¬ñ
8g What the?! Fire!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch, C.O.s already pushed that far...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch, C.O.s already pushed that far...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch, C.O.s already pushed that far...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will head there at once!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will head there at once!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will head there at once!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you go there, what happens to me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you go there, what happens to me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you go there, what happens to me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I would die even to a Category 2, let alone a Category 4!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I would die even to a Category 2, let alone a Category 4!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I would die even to a Category 2, let alone a Category 4!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is a lot to check on the Track Switcher before live deployment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is a lot to check on the Track Switcher before live deployment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is a lot to check on the Track Switcher before live deployment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Track Switcher twists the route of a dimension jumping object ascending to designated coordinates.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Track Switcher twists the route of a dimension jumping object ascending to designated coordinates.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Track Switcher twists the route of a dimension jumping object ascending to designated coordinates.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I need to design an additional system that boosts output enough to affect a Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I need to design an additional system that boosts output enough to affect a Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I need to design an additional system that boosts output enough to affect a Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then we must hurry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then we must hurry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then we must hurry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are the only one who can do this in Lotus, Senior.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are the only one who can do this in Lotus, Senior.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are the only one who can do this in Lotus, Senior.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As it happens, Hangar 5 is on the outskirts of the Direct Control City.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As it happens, Hangar 5 is on the outskirts of the Direct Control City.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As it happens, Hangar 5 is on the outskirts of the Direct Control City.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let us proceed with the work there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let us proceed with the work there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let us proceed with the work there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. Let's do that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay. Let's do that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. Let's do that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... Times like this, I wish I had two bodies.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... Times like this, I wish I had two bodies.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... Times like this, I wish I had two bodies.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That would double the number of problem children I need to watch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That would double the number of problem children I need to watch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That would double the number of problem children I need to watch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Grr... Though if there were two geniuses like me, the world would be much further along.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Grr... Though if there were two geniuses like me, the world would be much further along.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Grr... Though if there were two geniuses like me, the world would be much further along.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am just glad your genius found its way into engineering.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am just glad your genius found its way into engineering.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am just glad your genius found its way into engineering.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Without even that, you might have become a shut-in who plays seven games at once.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Without even that, you might have become a shut-in who plays seven games at once.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Without even that, you might have become a shut-in who plays seven games at once.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I... still do sometimes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I... still do sometimes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I... still do sometimes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did I ever tell you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did I ever tell you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did I ever tell you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: When I was little, I survived thanks to Titan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When I was little, I survived thanks to Titan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When I was little, I survived thanks to Titan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The slightest bit of alcohol and you always bring that up. I could not forget if I tried.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The slightest bit of alcohol and you always bring that up. I could not forget if I tried.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The slightest bit of alcohol and you always bring that up. I could not forget if I tried.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I mastered every field of engineering to meet Director Ember, and it brought me here...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I mastered every field of engineering to meet Director Ember, and it brought me here...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I mastered every field of engineering to meet Director Ember, and it brought me here...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yet in the end, I never met her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yet in the end, I never met her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yet in the end, I never met her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Director Ember was banished and then disappeared after that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Director Ember was banished and then disappeared after that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Director Ember was banished and then disappeared after that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well... learning to let go matters too. That's what being an adult is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well... learning to let go matters too. That's what being an adult is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well... learning to let go matters too. That's what being an adult is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: By the way, what do you intend to do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: By the way, what do you intend to do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: By the way, what do you intend to do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How exactly do you plan to save the city with your brilliant plan?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How exactly do you plan to save the city with your brilliant plan?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How exactly do you plan to save the city with your brilliant plan?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...One moment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...One moment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...One moment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Looks like the very people who can help with this have reached out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Looks like the very people who can help with this have reached out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Looks like the very people who can help with this have reached out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hello, Senior Isolde.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hello, Senior Isolde.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hello, Senior Isolde.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is Kim Chowon from Alphatrix Innovation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is Kim Chowon from Alphatrix Innovation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is Kim Chowon from Alphatrix Innovation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Leader told me you might need our help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Leader told me you might need our help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Leader told me you might need our help.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So the situation here has already reached you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So the situation here has already reached you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So the situation here has already reached you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. There's no time, so I will be brief.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. There's no time, so I will be brief.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. There's no time, so I will be brief.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ARC-EA2... Aswan is a place I frequented back in my mercenary days.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ARC-EA2... Aswan is a place I frequented back in my mercenary days.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ARC-EA2... Aswan is a place I frequented back in my mercenary days.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know the terrain. If I go, I'll be of real help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know the terrain. If I go, I'll be of real help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know the terrain. If I go, I'll be of real help.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Alphatrix Innovation, move for ARC-EA2 immediately.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Alphatrix Innovation, move for ARC-EA2 immediately.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Alphatrix Innovation, move for ARC-EA2 immediately.
